name: Environment Variable Validation
description: Validate all environment variables at startup using Zod. If any required variable is missing or has the wrong type, the app refuses to start with a clear error message listing exactly what's wrong.

steps.description: Create Zod schema for all env vars, parse process.env, export typed config object
Import env.ts first (before any other imports) to validate at startup
Ensure all variables from env.ts schema are documented with example values
Test that missing required vars throw with a clear message on startup

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Crash at startup if required env vars are missing — not at 2am in production
